Flow.description: Handles Change Control Request changes to the SP baselines
Flow.interviewLabel: GMS - Change Control Request Form - CF Baselines {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - SP Baselines

recordCreates.name: Create_new_updated_change_line_items
recordCreates.label: Create new updated change line items

recordDeletes.name: Delete_the_existing_baseline_change_line_items
recordDeletes.label: Delete the existing baseline change line items

recordLookups.name: Get_all_Change_Control_Line_Items
recordLookups.label: Get all Change Control Line Items

fields.name: GuidanceTotalSpends
fields.fieldText:
Please indicate below any change to your project total grant and co-funding spend using the ‘Award Baseline’ fields below. Once these have been completed, the ‘Next’ button will allow you to move through each Financial Year and amend your co-funding and grant funding per FY, as necessary.  

 

Finally, please indicate any changes to your grant capital and A&A spend, and your co-funding capital and A&A spend under the ‘Award Baseline’ section. You should be prompted to fill this section out once you have updated your spend per FY.  

 

Total grant funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project grant amount in your Award Baseline. Total co-funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project co-funding amount in your Award Baseline. These amounts can be seen below in the 'Total Grant Spend' and 'Total Co-funding Spend' fields.  

 

Please be reminded that: 

  • The overall co-funding contribution must be a minimum of 50% of eligible costs, excluding any costs incurred on homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH incentive offer. 
  • Grant A&A funding must total no more than 15% of total project grant funding. 
  • Total A&A costs must total no more than 15% of total project costs. 
  • Total grant capital requested must adhere to the project cost caps. More specifically, total grant requested must equal no more than: 

(£15,000 x homes accessing the off-gas grid LCH offer) + (20,000 x homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH offer) + (£7,500 x remaining homes i.e. homes not accessing any LCH incentive) 

  • All costs are assumed to be inclusive of any non-recoverable VAT.

fields.name: ProjectAABreachedDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Error - Total Project A&A is greater than 15% of the total project spend:

Proposed Project A&A is: {!flaProposedProjectAA}

15% of Proposed Project Spend is: {!fla15PercentProposedProjectSpend}

fields.name: Financial_Year_Baseline_Grant_Spend_Sum
fields.fieldText: Financial Year Baseline Grant Spend Sum

fields.name: Financial_Year_Baseline_Co_Funding_Spend_Sum
fields.fieldText: Financial Year Baseline Co Funding Spend Sum

validationRule.errorMessage: A&A Grant spend cannot exceed 15% of the total Grant Spend which is: {!flaAwardGrantAAMaxValidationDisplay}

fields.name: SaveGuildance
fields.fieldText: The save button will be disabled if Grant Capital plus Grant A&A does not equal the Financial Year sum for Grant, the same is true for the Co Funding values.

fields.name: CapitalCapBreached
fields.fieldText: Error - Grant Capital Cap Breached - Cap of {!flaCappedGrantSpend}

fields.name: GrantAAToHigh
fields.fieldText:
Error - Grant A&A spend too high

AA max calc {!flaAwardAAMaxAmount}

item {!varAwardBaselineItem.Grant_A_A_Spend__c}

baseline {!varAwardBaseline.Baseline_Grant_A_A_Spend__c}

fields.name: ErrorLchCoFundingDisplay
fields.fieldText: Error - Co Funding too low

fields.name: GuidanceSPSpends
fields.fieldText:
Please indicate below any change to your project total grant and co-funding spend using the ‘Award Baseline’ fields below. Once these have been completed, the ‘Next’ button will allow you to move through each Financial Year and amend your co-funding and grant funding per FY, as necessary.  

 

Finally, please indicate any changes to your grant capital and A&A spend, and your co-funding capital and A&A spend under the ‘Award Baseline’ section. You should be prompted to fill this section out once you have updated your spend per FY.  

 

Total grant funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project grant amount in your Award Baseline. Total co-funding spend across all FYs must equal the total project co-funding amount in your Award Baseline. These amounts can be seen below in the 'Total Grant Spend' and 'Total Co-funding Spend' fields. 

 

Please be reminded that: 

  • The overall co-funding contribution must be a minimum of 50% of eligible costs, excluding any costs incurred on homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH incentive offer. 
  • Grant A&A funding must total no more than 15% of total project grant funding. 
  • Total A&A costs must total no more than 15% of total project costs. 
  • Total grant requested must adhere to the project cost caps. More specifically, total grant requested must equal no more than: 

(£15,000 x homes accessing the off-gas grid LCH offer) + (20,000 x homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH offer) + (£7,500 x remaining homes i.e. homes not accessing any LCH incentive) 

  • All costs are assumed to be inclusive of any non-recoverable VAT.

subflows.name: GMS_Change_Control_Request_Baselines_Homes
subflows.label: GMS - Change Control Request Baselines Homes
